description: Forces a real multi-iteration recovery: the builder can only learn the required content from the failing check, so it must revise after iteration 1.

builder.instructions: You create or edit files to make the check that runs after you pass. Make the smallest change.

steps.prompt:
Create or fix the file src/secret.txt so the check after this step passes.

This is iteration {{ iteration }}. On iteration 1 you do NOT know the exact required contents, so make a plausible guess and write the file.

If the check failed last time, the failing command below reveals exactly what is required -- read it and make src/secret.txt contain precisely that single line:
{{ steps.verify.output }}
